steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage defines nameplate capacity as a wind farm’s maximum output and specifies Hallett Wind Farm’s value as 351 megawatts. The strongest signal is the requirement to cite the exact number and location to emphasize the statistic.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice A combines the farm’s name, its location (Hallett, Australia), and the precise nameplate capacity (351 megawatts) into a single, concise sentence.

The other three choices either omit the number (C), define a term without linking it to Hallett (D), or focus on general wind farm operations (B).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
